languages.text: "Люди делятся на полезных и бесполезных. Все трое твоих подопытных были жалким сбродом. Повтори эксперимент с кем-то достойным".
"People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."
languages.original_text: "Люди делятся на полезных и бесполезных. Все трое твоих подопытных были жалким сбродом. Повтори эксперимент с кем-то достойным".

traits.locale_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."
"People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."
"People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

languages.text: 「人間は有用なものと無用なものに分けられる。君の試験対象の３人は哀れなゴミだ。価値のある標本で実験を繰り返せ」
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: 「人間は有用なものと無用なものに分けられる。君の試験対象の３人は哀れなゴミだ。価値のある標本で実験を繰り返せ。」

languages.text: “人分有用和无用之人。你这三个实验体都是可悲的垃圾。用有价值的样本重做这个实验。”
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: “人分有用和无用之人。你这三个实验体都是可悲的垃圾。用有价值的样本重做这个实验。”

languages.text: « Les gens sont répartis en deux catégories : ceux qui sont utiles et ceux qui ne le sont pas. Vos trois sujets étaient aussi incapables les uns que les autres. Refaites votre expérience avec des spécimens adéquats. »
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: « Les gens sont répartis en deux catégories : ceux qui sont utiles et ceux qui ne le sont pas. Vos trois sujets étaient aussi incapables les uns que les autres. Refaites votre expérience avec des spécimens adéquats. »

languages.text: «La gente está dividida en útil e inútil. Sus tres sujetos eran basura lamentable. Repita el experimento con especímenes dignos».
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: «La gente está dividida en útil e inútil. Sus tres sujetos eran basura lamentable. Repita el experimento con especímenes dignos».

languages.text: "İnsanlar yararlı ve yaramaz olarak ikiye ayrılır. Üç denek de acınası birer çöptü. Deneyi buna layık kimselerle tekrarla."
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlar yararlı ve yaramaz olarak ikiye ayrılır. Üç denek de acınası birer çöptü. Deneyi buna layık kimselerle tekrarla."

languages.text: "Es gibt nützliche und nutzlose Menschen. Eure drei Testsubjekte waren erbärmliches Gesindel. Wiederholt das Experiment mit würdigen Subjekten."
languages.original_text: "People are divided into the useful and the useless. All three of your test subjects were piteous rubbish. Repeat the experiment with worthy specimens."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt nützliche und nutzlose Menschen. Eure drei Testsubjekte waren erbärmliches Gesindel. Wiederholt das Experiment mit würdigen Subjekten."
